violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. FOH upright cooler and BOH 2 door upright cooler not maintained below 41 degrees F.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Detail cleaning needed to FOH cabinets.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning under equipment and along wall junctures.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Damaged floor tiles around dish machine in BOH kitchen.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
